name: Dog Fest Turkey Slices (90G)
description: All natural treats & chews We range our treats based on the size and age of the dog. This helps to find a treat, which is just perfect just for your pet. You will still have to spend some time choosing a favorite flavor. Turkey Slices Reward him as a hero with something tasty! Turkey will alsobe your best choice if your dog has a sensitive stomach. Ingredients: turkey, vegetable by-products, minerals. Guaranteed analysis: crude protein 32%, crude fat 8.5%, crude fiber 0.2%, crude ash 4%, moisture 21%.
